resources.string:
Screens notifications from the apps chosen with the icon picker on the right.

Number Rules and Message Rules with Title / Body enabled under Apply to Notifications are checked against the notification, the same way as a real incoming SMS.
If the result is Block, the notification is dismissed.

This works independently of the SMS switch above, and requires Notification Access permission.

/ Body
Check this rule against notifications from the apps chosen in Notifications (in Screening).

The regex is searched for anywhere within the notification\'s title/body, it doesn\'t need to match the whole text.
